description: Create final GO curation decision table and comprehensive evidence summary figure
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 14))

# Panel A: GO Decision Table
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['GO:0005777\nperoxisome', 'Q8IPE8\n(isoform B)', 'IDA', 'PMID:22758915', 'RETAIN\n(high confidence)', 
     'mCherry-CG4389-PB colocalized\nwith PMP34-Cerulean in S2 cells.\nPaper: "exclusively peroxisomal"'],
    ['GO:0005777\nperoxisome', 'Q9V397\n(isoform A)', 'IDA', 'PMID:22758915', 'RETAIN\n(dual localized)', 
     'PA has PTS1 (SKL) + MTS extension.\nPaper: "dually localized to\nperoxisomes and mitochondria"'],
    ['GO:0005739\nmitochondrion', 'Q8IPE8\n(isoform B)', 'HDA', 'PMID:16212416\nPMID:19317464', 'REVIEW\n(may be PA signal)',
     'HDA proteomics cannot distinguish\nisoforms. PB lacks MTS.\nMay reflect PA contamination.'],
    ['GO:0005739\nmitochondrion', 'Q9V397\n(isoform A)', 'HDA', 'PMID:16212416\nPMID:19317464', 'RETAIN\n(supported)',
     'PA has 39-aa MTS extension\n(net charge +7, MitoProtII 97%).\nConsistent with dual targeting.'],
    ['GO:0005743\nmito inner membrane', 'Q8IPE8\n(isoform B)', 'IEA', 'UniProtKB-SubCell', 'REVIEW\n(gene-level IEA)',
     'IEA from gene family. PB has\nno MTS and no experimental\nevidence for mito membrane.'],
    ['GO:0005782\nperoxisomal matrix', 'Q8IPE8\n(isoform B)', '—', '—', 'CONSIDER\nADDING',
     'PTS1 targets to matrix.\nMore specific than GO:0005777.\nConsistent with IDA evidence.'],
]

col_labels = ['GO Term', 'UniProt\nAccession', 'Evidence\nCode', 'Reference', 'Recommended\nAction', 'Rationale']
table = ax1.table(cellText=table_data, colLabels=col_labels, loc='center',
                  cellLoc='center', colWidths=[0.14, 0.1, 0.08, 0.13, 0.12, 0.33])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 2.8)

# Color code by action
action_colors = {
    'RETAIN': '#ABEBC6',      # green
    'REVIEW': '#F9E79F',      # yellow
    'CONSIDER': '#AED6F1',    # blue
}
for i in range(len(table_data)):
    row = i + 1
    action = table_data[i][4]
    color = '#ABEBC6'
    if 'REVIEW' in action:
        color = '#F9E79F'
    elif 'CONSIDER' in action:
        color = '#AED6F1'
    for j in range(6):
        table[row, j].set_facecolor(color)
        
for j in range(6):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#D5D8DC')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_title('A. GO Curation Decision Table for CG4389/Mtpalpha Isoforms', 
              fontweight='bold', fontsize=12, pad=20)

# Panel B: Comprehensive evidence summary
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')

summary = """FINAL EVIDENCE SUMMARY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
VERDICT: SUPPORTED — GO:0005777 (peroxisome) annotation on Q8IPE8

KEY EVIDENCE CHAIN:
1. Q8IPE8 = CG4389-PB = isoform B (RefSeq NP_723470.1, 744 aa)
2. CG4389-PB LACKS the 39-aa MTS extension present in isoform A
3. CG4389-PB was EXPERIMENTALLY CONFIRMED as peroxisomal:
   → mCherry-CG4389-PB + PMP34-Cerulean colocalization (S2 cells)
   → Figure 4 of Faust et al. 2012 (PMID:22758915 / PMC3443258)
4. Paper explicitly states: PB/PC are "exclusively peroxisomal"
5. C-terminal PTS1 (SKL) is canonical; conserved across 10+ Drosophila spp.
6. AlphaFold: PTS1 on flexible tail (pLDDT ~26), accessible for Pex5
7. N-terminus has no MTS features (pLDDT 34-40, 8.3% identity to HADHA MTS)

ISOFORM-SPECIFIC LOCALIZATION:
• Isoform A (Q9V397, 783 aa): +39-aa MTS → DUAL (mito + perox)
• Isoform B (Q8IPE8, 744 aa): no MTS    → PEROXISOME ONLY
• Mitochondrial HDA evidence cannot distinguish isoforms

GENE FAMILY vs. PROTEIN FUNCTION:
• PANTHER/InterPro classify gene family as HADHA (mitochondrial)
• Faust et al. classify CG4389 as LBP/EHHADH homolog (peroxisomal)
• Resolution: ancestral gene split between HADHA/EHHADH in vertebrates;
  Drosophila retains single gene with isoform-specific targeting
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"""

ax2.text(0.02, 0.95, summary, transform=ax2.transAxes,
         fontsize=9.5, verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fef9e7', alpha=0.9))
ax2.set_title('B. Final Evidence Summary', fontweight='bold', fontsize=12)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('final_decision_table.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final decision table saved")
